thought.text: 我会先规划 Task2 并检查现有解析实现。

task_list.title: Inspect task2 parser framework and configuration
task_list.notes: Determine whether Bison or ANTLR is selected and how input/output are wired.

task_list.title: Run baseline task2 score
task_list.notes: Measure current pass rate and inspect representative AST diffs.

task_list.title: Implement parser/AST coverage for missing cases
task_list.notes: Patch selected parser and ASG conversion minimally for failing constructs.

task_list.title: Verify task2 score and iterate
task_list.notes: Run task2-score repeatedly until full score or best within budget.

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "plan", "task_list": [{"title": "Inspect task2 parser framework and configuration", "status": "in_progress", "notes": "Determine whether Bison or ANTLR is selected and how input/output are wired."}, {"title": "Run baseline task2 score", "status": "todo", "notes": "Measure current pass rate and inspect representative AST diffs."}, {"title": "Implement parser/AST coverage for missing cases", "status": "todo", "notes": "Patch selected parser and ASG conversion minimally for failing constructs."}, {"title": "Verify task2 score and iterate", "status": "todo", "notes": "Run task2-score repeatedly until full score or best within budget."}], "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Create task2 parser implementation plan"}
